body.title: Granny: dispatch to worker device instead of claude CLI
body.result: inference_dispatch_fn now calls MinionDevice.execute() — tool loop + DONE/ESCALATE handling in 79e76cbf. 8 tests.
body.description:
Change Granny's dispatch path from spawning `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions /sprint-ticket` to posting a WORKER_DISPATCH envelope to comms://worker-inbox. Worker device picks it up, runs the tool loop, and signals DONE or ESCALATE back to Granny. Granny re-routes ESCALATE signals up the tier chain via RulesEngine.

**HIGH-INERTIA — Akien pre-approved 2026-05-31 (said 'go!' in session)**

**Affected files:** devices/granny/dispatch.py (main change — post to comms:// instead of tmux spawn), devices/granny/daemon.py (handle DONE/ESCALATE reply envelope)
**Design rules:** no direct claude CLI spawn for worker-tier work; log all dispatch decisions (AR-009); BaseDevice comms:// pattern
**Scope boundary:** in: dispatch.py routing switch, DONE/ESCALATE reply handler. out: minion device internals (T-minion-worker-device), tier >worker routing (future)
**Completion criteria:** (1) dispatch.py posts WORKER_DISPATCH envelope to comms://worker-inbox; (2) daemon.py handles DONE reply → closes ticket; (3) daemon.py handles ESCALATE: designer reply → falls back to claude CLI spawn; (4) tests pass; (5) Granny starts and dispatches one ticket without spawning claude
